stem: A SaaS analytics study surveys 500 subscribers and observes 61 positive outcomes out of 500 (12.2%). Estimate the true customer churn rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.122. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0962, 0.1536]. Point estimate: 0.1249.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
